# mtt current task / working context
exec mtt init
# a single root type whose edges set/clear the current pointer (no gates, no require)
cp local.yaml .mtt/config.yaml
exec mtt add 'A'
stdout 'created t1'
exec mtt add 'B'
stdout 'created t2'

# explicit set + show
exec mtt use t1
stdout 'current: t1'
exec mtt use
stdout 't1  task  \[tbd\]'
exec mtt show
stdout 't1  task  \[tbd\]'

# clear, then let the take-into-work edge set current
exec mtt use --clear
stdout 'current cleared'
exec mtt use
stdout 'no current task'
exec mtt in_progress t1 --who a --why w
stdout 't1: tbd → in_progress'
exec mtt use
stdout 't1  task  \[in_progress\]'

# omitted-id verb on current + the ->done edge clears the pointer
exec mtt done
stdout 't1: in_progress → done'
exec mtt use
stdout 'no current task'

# no current -> a bare verb errors helpfully; a nonsense arg is unknown command
! exec mtt done
stderr 'no current task'
! exec mtt bogus
stderr 'unknown command'

# explicit independence
exec mtt use t2
stdout 'current: t2'
exec mtt show
stdout 't2  task  \[tbd\]'

# use --json: the current task or null (t45)
exec mtt use --clear
exec mtt use --json
stdout '^null'
# set a current -> the task object
exec mtt use t1 --json
stdout '"id": "t1"'
# clear --json -> null
exec mtt use --clear --json
stdout '^null'

-- local.yaml --
version: 1
project:
  name: demo
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    parents: []
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: in_progress, kind: active}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: in_progress, current: set}
      - {from: in_progress, to: done, current: clear}
